resources.string: No registered capabilities for this device. Try the Brands page to learn more.
Bypass charging is active now. This screen refreshes live while it is open.
Bypass setting is ON. Charge Pilot is watching charger, battery, and game conditions below.
Bypass setting is ON. Charge Pilot is checking live conditions now.
App control is ready. Use the Turn on/off bypass charging button below.
Install Shizuku from here, return to Charge Pilot, then continue setup.
Open Shizuku from here, start it with Wireless debugging, then return to Charge Pilot.
Grant Charge Pilot permission from here, then use Charge Pilot to control bypass charging.
This build can control bypass charging after Shizuku setup is complete.
No app-control backend is currently registered for this device. The fallback path remains available below.
Open Brands to see which manufacturers and charging modes are currently mapped.
Use your phone Battery settings for manual charging protection until this model is added.
Open fallback path only when Charge Pilot has no app-control backend for this device.
App control needs one Android grant: enable Modify system settings for Charge Pilot, return, then tap Turn on bypass charging again.
Shizuku is installed but not running. Open Shizuku, start it with Wireless debugging, then return to Charge Pilot.
Shizuku is running but Charge Pilot still needs permission. Tap Grant Shizuku permission and approve the prompt.
%1$s: grant Modify system settings, return, then tap Turn on bypass charging again
%1$s: approve the permission prompt, then return
Opened Samsung game classification. Use Game category settings, mark the target app as Game, then launch it.
Opened Galaxy Store for Game Booster+. Install it, open Game category settings, then mark the target app as Game.
Could not open Samsung game classification setup.
Opened Gaming Hub. Use it to reach Game Booster settings; app-as-game classification still needs Game Booster+.
Could not open Gaming Hub on this device.

To verify the “supported game in foreground” condition, grant Usage access to Charge Pilot. Without it the key can still be ON, but Active status cannot be confirmed. Charge Pilot never spoofs a game session.
Opened Usage access settings. Grant Charge Pilot, then return.
Could not open Usage access settings on this device.
Normal apps need Samsung game classification
Samsung bypass charging only engages during a Game Booster game session. Adding a shortcut to Gaming Hub is not enough.
Install Game Plugins + Game Booster+. In Game Booster+ → Game category settings, mark the target app as Game, then launch it.
This S24 Ultra One UI 8 build returned “Unable to run: GOS Lite”; normal-app game classification is blocked on this firmware.
